query: /* select#1 */ select `testdb`.`users`.`id` AS `id`,`testdb`.`users`.`name` AS `name`,`testdb`.`users`.`email` AS `email`,`testdb`.`users`.`country` AS `country`,`testdb`.`users`.`created_at` AS `created_at` from `testdb`.`users` where ((`testdb`.`users`.`country` = 'DE') and (`testdb`.`users`.`created_at` > DATE'2022-01-01'))

inputs.operation: Index lookup on users using idx_country (country='DE'), with index condition: (users.country = 'DE')
